extensionDescription.message: Converts store prices into work time based on your salary and work routine.

optionsTitle.message: What does it cost in your time

optionsSubtitle.message: Set your salary, reference period, and the exchange rule used to turn prices into time.

optionsCoreSectionHint.message: Set your salary, reference period, and the rate used to convert prices into time.

optionsDisplaySectionHint.message: Adjust how time appears in the badge and how much detail it shows.

optionsSitesSectionHint.message: Choose where the extension appears and which stores are manually disabled.

popupSubtitle.message: Open the options to adjust your hourly cost reference.

manualRateHint.message: Use this only when your salary is in USD and you want to lock the conversion to BRL.

replacePricesWithHoursHint.message: Turn it on to hide the price and show only the time needed to buy the product.

siteBlockHint.message: Use the switches below to turn off the extension for specific stores.

resetConfirmMessage.message: Are you sure you want to restore the original settings? All your preferences will be lost.

savedWithExchangeWarning.message: Settings saved, but the automatic exchange-rate refresh failed.

saveErrorToastMessage.message: Please try again in a moment.

manualRateRequired.message: Enter a manual rate greater than zero.

hourlyRateRequired.message: Enter an hourly rate greater than zero.

extendedTimeDisplayHint.message: Show days, months and years for items that cost more than 24h of work.

socialAwarenessSectionHint.message: Optionally monitor Instagram, YouTube, YouTube (Shorts), and TikTok with discreet prompts and a non-judgmental tone.

socialAwarenessEnabledHint.message: Turns on optional active-use tracking with discreet toasts and a reflective end-of-session summary.

socialAwarenessSitesHint.message: When you enable the feature, all supported sites start checked by default. You can uncheck any of them.

socialPromptEnabledHint.message: Shows the first check-in between 1 and 3 minutes and, after your first response, schedules new check-ins randomly between 3 and 7 minutes of visible use.

socialTrackingEnabledHint.message: Counts while the tab stays visible; leaving the page or switching tabs pauses the timer automatically.

socialReflectionEnabledLabel.message: Ask at the end of the session

socialReflectionEnabledHint.message: Resumes the last monitored session and only shows a summary when you say it did not stay aligned.

socialMonetaryOptInHint.message: Off by default. The approximate value of the session only appears if you opt into that view.

socialAwarenessSiteRequired.message: Select at least one social network to monitor.

socialPromptBodyInitial.message: Is this session aligned with what you wanted to do here?

socialPromptBodyInterim.message: Is this session still aligned with what you opened the site to do?

socialPromptGoalPlaceholder.message: e.g. watch one specific video, reply to someone, relax

socialReflectionBody.message: On your last session on $1, you spent $2 of active time. Did that stay aligned with what you wanted to do?

socialSummaryBody.message: Active time in this session: $1 on $2.

socialSummaryResponse.message: In the final check-in, you chose: $1.

socialSummaryMoney.message: Approximate value at your current hourly reference: $1.
